rule_train_stats.description: S&P 500 above its 200-day average (market uptrend); VIX above 30 (panic); RSI(14) below 35 (oversold); volatility in the bottom third of its own 1-year range

S&P 500 above its 200-day average (market uptrend); VIX above 30 (panic); stock above 200-day avg and 50-day avg above 200-day avg; 10-25% below its 52-week high; volatility in the bottom third of its own 1-year range; positive 12-month momentum (excluding last month)
